response.global_summary: The video is a clip from the "Usada Pekora 7th Anniversary LIVE" concert. It features a musical performance of the song "RADIANT FORCE", originally composed by Noriyasu Agematsu (Elements Garden). The segment includes a brief intro followed by the full performance.

scenes.description: Introductory stage setup for the concert, featuring event branding and atmospheric lighting.
Performance of the song 'RADIANT FORCE' by Usada Pekora and other virtual performers on a brightly lit, multi-tiered stage.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Start the song, start the heartbeat,
Let the sound of hope ring out!
"Don't give up on living," show it,
The curtain rise of a passionate dream!
Explode, there are no lies in this miracle!

What is that hand for, to grab hold of?
Probably just waiting won't make it come true.
What is that hand for, to protect?
The heat that is passed on will become the spark to make tomorrow shine!

Come, let's pull the trigger to the new era,
Countdown to the legendary future.
Flapping wings are not alone,
Beyond the past we have surpassed,
The history that should be created is blooming and burning!

Bond, heart, bundled into one,
Let the sound of hope ring out!
"Don't give up on believing," sing it,
There is no zero in possibility!
Fly, let there be light in this miracle!

Tear it open, to go to days we have not yet seen,
There is no such thing as impossible.
There is nothing as heartening as this,
Absolutely, absolutely, absolutely, believe in each other and break through!

Even if it seems like you'll be sucked into the darkness,
Even if your tears are soaked in blood and it's painful,
The place to return to is waiting.
Gather, protect, pledge,
The crystal of courage is a miracle!

Wish, prayer, carrying it all on your back,
A song of earnestness that exceeds earnestness!
Nothing like pain is scary,
Boil, let it boil, this body!
Hold it up, come, lightning in the dark night!

Meeting, laughing together, and then sobbing,
Burning the flame of life together too,
All five senses scream,
As much as can be called love,
The proof of a friend that shines dazzlingly!

Bond, heart, bundled into one,
Let the sound of hope ring out!
"Don't give up on believing," sing it,
There is no zero in possibility!
Fly, let there be light in this miracle!

response.thoughts:
**Analyzing the Musical Performance Video**

Okay, so the user wants me to break down this video of a musical performance, identify the songs, and track down the official lyrics. My initial thought process is this:

First, let's analyze the video itself. It seems like a live concert clip, judging from the "兎田ぺこら7周年記念LIVE" title screen. The performance seems to kick in around 00:51, and it's clear there's a song playing. At 01:04, the on-screen text gives us the song title: "RADIANT FORCE". The performance continues until the end of the clip. The performers are multiple VTubers, and the song is in Japanese. So far, so good.

Next, I need to extract the relevant metadata. I've got the song title ("RADIANT FORCE"), and I also see "作詞・作曲：上松範康 (Elements Garden)" on screen. That tells me who wrote and composed the song. My goal is to find the *official* original artist. Then, I also know the performers are Usada Pekora and others, and the language is Japanese.

Now, time to strategize the search. I'll need to use `default_api:web_search_langsearch_multi` to effectively search the web. I'll run parallel searches to make sure I get the right results. For the first search, I'll use the original language: "RADIANT FORCE 上松範康 歌詞". I'll also run an English search query: "RADIANT FORCE Elements Garden lyrics english". This should broaden the search to include any relevant English translations or information.

Finally, I need to structure the output. I'll create a JSON object. The `global_summary` will briefly state that it's a live concert clip featuring a performance of "RADIANT FORCE". Then, I will segment the video into scenes. I'm seeing two distinct scenes. Scene 1 will cover the intro/stage setup, from 00:00 to 00:51. Scene 2 will contain the actual performance of "RADIANT FORCE", from 00:51 to the end of the clip at 05:01.

Alright, let's start by executing these searches.



Here's my summary, as the thought process you described:

**Data Acquisition Complete: Time for Synthesis**

Alright, that was efficient. I've successfully pinpointed the critical elements for this task: the song's title, "RADIANT FORCE," the original creative force behind it – Noriyasu Agematsu of Elements Garden, and, crucially, the full lyrics, neatly presented in both Japanese and their Romanized/English structure. All the required information is now compiled and verified. Time to craft the final presentation. Let's make it concise, accurate, and ready to go.
